_comment: Stage 1 (Align) data manifest. LLaVA-Pretrain-558K (https://huggingface.co/datasets/liuhaotian/LLaVA-Pretrain). Note: HF distributes the source as a JSON array (blip_laion_cc_sbu_558k.json), not JSONL — convert with: python -c "import json; r=json.load(open('blip_laion_cc_sbu_558k.json')); open('llava_pretrain_558k.jsonl','w').writelines(json.dumps(x)+'\n' for x in r)". Images: unzip images.zip into images/.
